import itertools


def find_matching_pairs(users, products):
    all_pairs = list(itertools.product(users, products))
    results = []
    for user, product in all_pairs:
        if user.region == product.region and user.age >= product.min_age:
            results.append((user, product))
    return results


def cross_join_filter(orders, inventory):
    pairs = list(itertools.product(orders, inventory))
    matched = []
    for order, item in pairs:
        if order.sku == item.sku and order.quantity <= item.stock:
            matched.append((order, item))
    return matched


def generate_combinations(items_a, items_b):
    all_combos = [(a, b) for a in items_a for b in items_b]
    valid = [combo for combo in all_combos if combo[0].type == combo[1].type]
    return valid
